name: BalProvRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MAX(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TrgtSys}' AND SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSys}' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SubjCd}' AND ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'N' AND CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD ) UPDATE t SET ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'Y', CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS t JOIN cte ON cte.SRC_SYS_CD = t.SRC_SYS_CD AND cte.TRGT_SYS_CD = t.TRGT_SYS_CD AND cte.SUBJ_CD = t.SUBJ_CD WHERE t.RUN_CYC_NO <= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND t.ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'N' AND t.CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'N'

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


CALLED BY:    IdsProvBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job Updates the P_RUN_CYC table with the ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN and CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN set to 'Y' after balancing is done for the subject area

Annotations:
Job Name:
BalProvRunCycUpd_EE

Balancing Provider Row To Row and Column Sum Update for P_RUN_CYC table
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Provider with a value \"N\" in the  ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN and CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table with Balancing Indicators set to 'Y' to indicate source system data has been balanced with respect to IDS for each of the run cycles processed.
Copy for Pass Thru
